predictions.name: sigma_0 regime structure
predictions.sqt_prediction: Cluster sigma_0 / Galactic sigma_0 ≈ 0.017 (1.81 dex span, Branch B)
predictions.lcdm_prediction: Different DM/baryon mixing per regime; no SQT-specific
predictions.observable: cluster lensing-derived a_0 vs SPARC galactic a_0

predictions.name: dark energy = quantum creation
predictions.sqt_prediction: Lambda_eff = (n_inf · eps) / c² with n_inf = Gamma_0 · tau_q
predictions.verlinde_prediction: Dark energy from cosmic horizon entropy
predictions.lcdm_prediction: Lambda is a constant; no microscopic mechanism
predictions.observable: Lambda evolution if Gamma_0(t) varies, OR sub-percent deviations from constant Lambda

predictions.name: quantum depletion zones
predictions.sqt_prediction: n(near matter) < n_inf; depletion radius r_dep ~ (n_inf / (sigma_0 · rho_m))^(1/3)
predictions.aqual_prediction: Scalar field, but no depletion concept
predictions.observable: subtle gradient in dynamical mass/Newtonian g near isolated massive bodies

predictions.name: GW absorption (not just dispersion)
predictions.sqt_prediction: GW amplitude attenuated by quantum substrate absorption ~ exp(-D / D_abs) where D_abs ~ 1/(sigma_GW · n_inf)
predictions.observable: Distance-dependent GW amplitude reduction; predict d_L_GW vs d_L_EM mismatch

predictions.name: specific BBN constraint on Gamma_0
predictions.sqt_prediction: Gamma_0 (cosmic creation rate) must satisfy primordial constraint: Gamma_0·tau_q at z~10^9 doesn't disturb BBN n/p ratio
predictions.observable: Primordial light element abundances (D, He-4, Li-7)

predictions.name: environmental scatter in galactic a_0
predictions.sqt_prediction: Within galactic regime, sigma_0 has intrinsic scatter ~0.567 dex (L72 O8) due to per-galaxy matter distribution. NOT pure measurement noise.
predictions.mond_prediction: a_0 universal, scatter only from M/L noise
predictions.observable: a_0 vs galaxy properties (gas fraction, dynamics) after removing M/L bias

predictions.name: Milgrom a_0 = c·H_0/(2π) derivation
predictions.sqt_prediction: a_0 emerges from sigma_0(sc)·rho_crit·c·(1/π) = c·H_0/(2π) with no fit parameters
predictions.observable: if a_0 evolves with H_0(z), SQT predicts specific dependence; MOND has no z-dependence

summary: SQT predicts 7 effects that NONE of MOND/AQUAL/Verlinde/LCDM match in detail. P1 (regime structure), P2 (DE mechanism), P3 (quantum depletion), P4 (GW absorption), P5 (BBN bound), P6 (intrinsic scatter), P7 (Milgrom from cosmology). Each is testable in the next 5-10 years.
grade_impact: 정량 예측 ★★★★ → ★★★★★ (7 distinctive predictions); 반증 가능성 ★★★★★ 유지 (further specified); self-consistency ★★★★ → ★★★★★
